name: Model Theory — Structures
description: Signature: symbols (constants, functions, relations). Structure: domain + interpretations. Terms, formulas. Satisfaction M ⊨ φ[a] (φ true in M under assignment a).
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Signature\nconst, func, rel symbols"]
    D2["Def: Structure M\ndomain + interp"]
    D3["Def: Term\nbuilt from vars, const, func"]
    D4["Def: Formula\natoms, ∧∨¬→∀∃"]
    D5["Def: Satisfaction\nM ⊨ φ a"]
    T1["Thm: Tarski\nrecursive def of ⊨"]
    D1 --> D2
    D1 --> D3
    D3 --> D4
    D2 --> D5
    D4 --> D5
    D5 --> T1
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3,D4,D5 definition
    class T1 theorem
